title: Next Level Hackathon

timeline.submissionWindowNotes: Devpost schedule lists submissions from March 10 at 5:30 AM PDT to March 22 at 2:00 PM PDT.

rules.allowedPriorWork: Projects should be built during the hackathon period.
specialConstraints: Submit a functional prototype, application, or technical implementation.
Include a short demo video of about 2–3 minutes.
Ensure all team members are listed correctly on the Devpost submission page.

notes: Public Devpost page parsed without logging in.
Overview page also refers to the event as Next Level Product Sprint 2026.
Theme areas mentioned publicly include AI, product innovation, startup prototypes, social impact solutions, web technologies, and cloud computing.
